project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Quant Ecosystem with 16 apps and 70+ packages
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Each package has tsc build, vitest tests, eslint lint. Root turbo.json orchestrates. No Dockerfile needed for validation.
test_framework: vitest with __tests__ directories in each package. Tests use describe/it/expect pattern. React components tested with @testing-library/react.
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck (111 tasks), pnpm test (114 tasks), pnpm build (88 tasks). All must pass with 0 errors.
setup_instructions: pnpm install already done. Node 22, pnpm available.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 with pnpm. No Docker needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: No @ts-ignore or @ts-expect-error. Real implementations with meaningful tests. Green gates: typecheck/build/test all pass.
key_patterns: Package structure: src/index.ts exports, src/__tests__/*.test.ts for tests, tsconfig.json per package. Package naming: @quant/<name>. Dependencies use workspace:*. Each package.json has typecheck/test/build/lint scripts.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (16 apps), packages/ (70+ packages), services/, e2e/, scripts/, infra/, k6/, models/, docs/. Each package: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, src/__tests__/.
